case_title: ARCADIA FINANCIAL LTD VS. MILAGROS P DASALLA et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCADIA FINANCIAL LTD AS TO DEFENDANT DASALLA, MILAGROS P DASALLA, ANTONIO DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-26-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-27-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-11-2003
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
RE AFFIDAVIT OF AMY TOWNSLEY OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF COURT JUDGMENT . FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCADIA FINANCIAL LTD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARCADIA FINANCIAL LTD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DASALLA, MILAGROS P DASALLA, ANTONIO $19,402.42 PRINCIPAL, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,892.40 INTEREST, $392.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,287.32, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
